name: Nitrocop violation parity vs RuboCop on wt-gph-rspec-rip-out

description: Baseline: nitrocop trails RuboCop by 1653 offenses on wt-gph-rspec-rip-out and is above the 100ms constraint.

asi.hypothesis: Establish baseline parity gap and runtime before code changes.
asi.next_focus: increase offense coverage first, then recover speed

description: Control rerun with cached RuboCop count showed runtime under 100ms but no violation parity improvement.

asi.hypothesis: Warm-cache rerun would clarify whether runtime constraint is currently binding.
asi.learning: Runtime is now below 100ms on warm run; parity gap remains the only primary bottleneck.
asi.next_action_hint: Focus on adding missing offenses/cops rather than speed tweaks.
asi.cache_effect: RuboCop count caching removed setup overhead

description: Enabled preview-tier cops when AllCops/NewCops is enabled, closing the offense-count gap to RuboCop on this workload.

asi.hypothesis: RuboCop parity gap is largely from preview-tier cops being gated off despite NewCops: enable.
asi.learning: Parity reached exactly (delta 0), indicating missing offenses came from preview gating behavior.
asi.runtime_note: This run appears cold-cache after config behavior change; measure warm-cache before judging 100ms constraint.
asi.next_action_hint: Re-run unchanged to measure warmed runtime and then optimize cache behavior if still >100ms

description: Control rerun confirmed parity remains exact, but warmed runtime is still above the 100ms constraint.

asi.hypothesis: Cold-cache inflation caused high runtime; warm rerun might satisfy 100ms.
asi.learning: Warm run dropped from 891ms to 222ms but still violates <100ms.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric unchanged (still 0); this run was measurement-only.
asi.next_action_hint: Start a runtime-focused phase while preserving violation_delta=0 behavior.

description: Switched benchmark to measure the user's actual default nitrocop command; parity remains exact but runtime still exceeds 100ms.

asi.hypothesis: JSON formatting overhead inflated runtime; measuring default formatter should reduce nitrocop_ms.
asi.learning: Default output reduced runtime from ~222ms to ~158ms, but still above target.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric unchanged at 0 for this script-only measurement tweak.
asi.next_action_hint: Pursue runtime optimizations in lint pipeline/cache while keeping NewCops-driven parity behavior.

description: Optimized progress formatter path lookups, but first post-build run remained cold and far above the 100ms runtime target.

asi.hypothesis: Avoiding to_string_lossy allocations in progress formatter would shave runtime.
asi.learning: No useful signal from this first run due cold-cache behavior after rebuild.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric unchanged at 0; runtime still above constraint in this measurement.
asi.next_action_hint: Re-run unchanged after cache warm-up to evaluate formatter optimization impact.

name: Nitrocop runtime under 100ms with RuboCop parity preserved
